name: VideoVault Premiere Extension
releaseNotes:
- Bumped the Premiere extension release line to `1.8.1`.
- Kept the extension-side proxy request UX accurate instead of over-claiming that the NAS queue definitely accepted the request.
- Preserved the newer shell and comments-gating behavior introduced in `1.8.0`.
- Updated the shipped extension version to `1.8.1`.
- Tightened the proxy creation CTA copy so it reflects that VideoVault Connect resolves the right NAS before queueing.
- Left the core proxy-create bridge dispatch unchanged so it remains compatible with the desktop routing patch.
- Extension version bumped to `1.8.1`.
- Update `extensions/adobe-premiere/latest.json` in `videovault-release-updates` after packaging the new macOS and Windows installers.
- Release tag should follow:
- `premiere-extension-v1.8.1`
